name: Suzhou Editorial Desk
shortBio: Maintains Suzhou coverage with a focus on garden pacing, canal districts, and practical short-stay choices.
fullBio: The Suzhou Editorial Desk maintains guides, place pages, and planning coverage related to Suzhou. Its focus is helping readers use gardens, old canal districts, and station-to-hotel logistics well so the city stays calm, walkable, and rewarding on a short stay.
reviewProcess: Pages are reviewed for walkability, district usefulness, and whether the advice still reflects practical Suzhou travel conditions.
seoTitle: Suzhou Editorial Desk | China Travel Notes
seoDescription: Meet the desk that maintains Suzhou guides, place pages, and planning coverage on China Travel Notes.
